message:
fix: preview server serves index.html for directories, minor cleanups

- pages/preview.rs: Serve index.html when directory path requested
- pages/bundle.rs: Add is_file() check before copying payload chunks
- search/daemon_client.rs: Format multi-line assert statements
- search/model_download.rs: Formatting (join lines)
- semantic_integration.rs: Add PathBuf import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
